events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Peace and love to Ringo Starr, who celebrates his 86th birthday. What's your favourite Ringo moment, on or off the drums?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! From stadium-rocking riffs to actual astrophysics, is there anything this legend can't do?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' legendary frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Mick Jagger is 83 today. What's your favourite Rolling Stones track that gets you dancing?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video aired.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever. The first video? 'Video Killed The Radio Star.' The irony is still golden.

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' is 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and Britpop was never the same. What's your top track from this absolute classic?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival, a pivotal moment in music history, concluded on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Rewind 57 years to Woodstock! Three days of peace, love, and music that defined a generation. If you could have been there, who would you have seen?

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who died in 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today since we lost the King, Elvis Presley. His music lives on, always. What's your go-to Elvis track?

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur in 1996.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, 30 years since his passing. His impact on music and culture remains undeniable.

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix in 1970.

angles.name: Guitar God Remembered
angles.copy: Fifty-six years ago today, the music world lost a true visionary, Jimi Hendrix. His guitar work still sounds revolutionary.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' is 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album Cover
angles.copy: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' was released 57 years ago today. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history!

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Trailblazer
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock trailblazer with a voice that commands attention.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and solo artist Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock N Roll Star
angles.copy: Our kid is 54! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite tune featuring that unmistakable voice?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' is 51
events.blurb: John Lennon released his timeless anthem 'Imagine' on this day in 1975.

angles.name: A Song For Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-one years ago, John Lennon gave us 'Imagine' – a song that still resonates with its powerful message of peace and unity.

events.title: First iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the very first iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: Music In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember life before the iPod? 25 years ago today, Apple changed the game for music lovers everywhere. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: Global James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is Global James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the 1962 premiere of the first James Bond film, 'Dr. No'.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy Global James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred, naturally) to 64 years of 007 on the big screen. Who's your favourite Bond?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the enduring legacy of John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.
